title: Marketplace Manager - OYO Rooms - Immediate Joiners Preferred

jsonLd.title: Marketplace Manager - OYO Rooms - Immediate Joiners Preferred
jsonLd.description:
Join the OYO Rooms family as a Marketplace Manager in Thane. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About OYO Rooms:
OYO Rooms is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Thane, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with OYO Rooms!
